sense.definition: an electronic lock that can be locked and unlocked through various methods such as keyless entry, biometric verification, or remote control using a smartphone app

examples.x: She unlocked the front door using her phone, thanks to the smart door lock installed at her home.
The smart door lock allows him to let guests in while he is away on vacation.
They decided to install a smart door lock for added security and convenience.
I forgot my keys, but I was able to unlock the door using the app for the smart door lock.
With a smart door lock, you can give temporary access codes to visitors or service people.

sense.definition: a device that can be controlled remotely and programmed to automatically adjust the temperature of a home or building based on the user's preferences and behavior patterns

examples.x: Installing a smart thermostat helped reduce energy costs by learning the household's schedule.
Over time, the smart thermostat adapts to the daily routines of the household, making temperature control more efficient.
A smart thermostat helps save energy by adjusting the temperature when no one is at home.
We love how the smart thermostat keeps our house at the perfect temperature without having to manually adjust it.

sense.definition: a smart electronic device that uses voice recognition and natural language processing to enable users to control their smart home devices, answer questions, and perform other tasks through voice commands

examples.x: I use my home assistant device to turn off the lights when I leave the house.
With a simple voice command, the home assistant device can play my favorite music.
I ask my home assistant device for traffic updates before leaving for work.
I can control the temperature in my home through my home assistant device.

sense.definition: an electronic device that plugs into a wall outlet and allows you to control the power supply to another device that is plugged into it through a mobile app or voice assistant

examples.x: I can control my lamp from anywhere with the smart plug connected to my phone.
He uses a smart plug to schedule his coffee maker to start brewing in the morning.
You can monitor the energy usage of your appliances through the smart plug’s app.
She plugged her air purifier into the smart plug to easily control it with voice commands.
With the smart plug, I can turn on the lights before I even get home.

sense.definition: a device or alarm that starts beeping if it detects smoke or fire

examples.x: The smoke alarm woke them up during the night, alerting them to a fire in the kitchen.
It's important to test smoke alarms regularly to ensure they are functioning properly.
The landlord installed smoke alarms in every room of the apartment building to comply with safety regulations.
She replaced the batteries in the smoke alarm after it started beeping intermittently.
The smoke alarm system is connected to the building's fire alarm system for immediate response in case of emergencies.

sense.definition: a set of audio and visual equipment designed to provide an immersive movie theater experience in a private residence

examples.x: A home theater system can turn your living room into the perfect spot for movie nights.
We invested in a home theater system to make our weekends more enjoyable.
The new home theater system has made watching sports at home feel just like being at the stadium.
I love how the home theater system makes every movie feel like a big-screen experience.

sense.definition: a type of speaker that connects to audio sources without the need for cables or wires

examples.x: I use a wireless speaker to listen to music while I’m cooking in the kitchen.
She took the wireless speaker to the beach to enjoy her favorite songs by the water.
My wireless speaker has a long battery life, so I can play music all day without charging it.
I connected my phone to the wireless speaker using Bluetooth, and the sound quality was amazing.

sense.definition: a device that enables wireless communication between multiple devices and provides internet access

examples.x: The Wi-Fi router in our living room provides fast internet access throughout the house.
I need to reset the Wi-Fi router because the internet connection is not working properly.
The new Wi-Fi router has a stronger signal and covers a larger area than the old one.
She connected her phone to the Wi-Fi router to browse the internet without using mobile data.
We bought a new Wi-Fi router that supports faster speeds for streaming and gaming.

sense.definition: a smart device that allows homeowners to see and communicate with visitors remotely via a mobile app, while also providing motion detection and other security features

examples.x: She checked her phone after hearing the doorbell and saw a delivery driver on the video doorbell.
The video doorbell lets me speak to anyone at the door, even when I am not home.
He installed a video doorbell to keep track of visitors and improve home security.
The video doorbell records footage, so I can review who came to my door when I was away.

sense.definition: a self-contained, programmable device that uses sensors and brushes to clean floors autonomously

examples.x: I programmed my robot vacuum cleaner to clean the living room every morning.
The robot vacuum cleaner automatically starts cleaning as soon as I leave the house.
After it finishes cleaning, the robot vacuum cleaner returns to its charging station.
My robot vacuum cleaner has saved me so much time on cleaning the floors.
I love how quiet the robot vacuum cleaner is while it cleans.

sense.definition: an electrical outlet that can be controlled remotely using a smartphone app, voice command, or automated schedule

examples.x: With a smart outlet, I can turn on the coffee maker from bed in the morning.
You can control the lamp with your voice through the smart outlet.
I use the smart outlet to schedule the heater to turn on before I get home.
The smart outlet helps me save energy by turning off devices when not in use.

sense.definition: an internet-connected television with built-in software for accessing online content and apps without external devices
a specialized computer system designed for playing video games on a TV or other display screen

examples.x: The gaming console allows you to play the latest video games on your television.
I spent the whole afternoon playing with my gaming console, trying to beat my high score.
He connected his gaming console to the TV and started playing a new adventure game.
You can download new games directly to your gaming console from the online store.
She received a gaming console for her birthday and couldn't wait to try it out.

sense.definition: a compact electronic device designed for individual use, capable of performing various tasks such as word processing, internet browsing, and multimedia applications
a piece of equipment used for playing recorded music, making a live performance, or turning up sound through speakers

examples.x: They set up a sound system in the park for the outdoor concert.
The sound system in the auditorium ensured that everyone could hear the speaker clearly.
He bought a new sound system to enhance the audio quality of his home theater.
The band used a professional sound system to amplify their performance during the festival.
She adjusted the sound system's settings to balance the music and vocals at the event.

sense.definition: a small device that lets you control electrical or electronic devices like TVs from a distance

examples.x: He pressed the button on the remote control to pause the movie.
My dad loves using the remote control to switch between different sports channels.
She bought a new remote control for her smart TV to access all its features.
The remote control for the garage door opener allows easy access to the house.
The remote control makes it convenient to operate electronic devices from a distance.

sense.definition: a device provided by a cable TV provider that receives cable signals and delivers TV programming to a connected television set

examples.x: The cable box allows us to watch all of our favorite TV channels.
I need to set up the cable box to get a better signal for the TV.
The technician installed the cable box and made sure everything was working.
We use the cable box to record shows while we are away.
I can’t find the remote for the cable box, so I had to manually change the channel.

sense.definition: a device that enables the streaming of digital media, such as movies, TV shows, and music, from online platforms directly to a television or other display

examples.x: I bought a streaming device so I can watch my favorite shows without cable.
I connected the streaming device to the TV, and now I can watch everything online.
With a streaming device, you can stream movies and music directly to your TV.
She plugged the streaming device into the TV to watch her favorite shows.

sense.definition: a device that plays content such as movies or shows from flat discs called DVDs on your TV or other display
an audio setup with two or more speakers and an amplifier, designed for music or entertainment sound

examples.x: She turned on her stereo system to fill the room with music.
They upgraded their stereo system for better sound quality.
His stereo system has two powerful speakers for a full audio effect.
The old stereo system still works perfectly, despite its age.
A stereo system can enhance movie-watching with realistic sound effects.

sense.definition: a device that uses advanced technology to detect smoke and fire and send alerts to the homeowner's smartphone or other smart devices

examples.x: The smart smoke alarm sent me an alert when it detected smoke in the kitchen.
I can check the status of my smart smoke alarm on my phone even when I’m not home.
After testing the smart smoke alarm, I received a notification that the battery was low.
My smart smoke alarm has a feature that lets me silence it remotely if I accidentally burn food.

sense.definition: an electronic security device that, when activated, emits a loud noise to deter and alert about unauthorized entry into a house, building, or other premises

examples.x: The burglar alarm went off, scaring away the intruders.
She installed a new burglar alarm to enhance the security of her home.
The loud noise of the burglar alarm alerted the neighbors to the attempted break-in.
The burglar alarm system is designed to protect the building from unauthorized entry.
He activated the burglar alarm before leaving the house for the weekend.

sense.definition: a device that gives warning of a fire, by making a loud noise

examples.x: The fire alarm rang loudly, causing everyone in the building to exit quickly.
She pulled the fire alarm when she saw smoke coming from the kitchen.
The fire alarm's piercing sound alerted the residents of the apartment complex.
They tested the fire alarm system to ensure it was working correctly.
The fire alarm in the school activated, prompting an orderly evacuation drill.

sense.definition: a communication system that allows people in different parts of a plane, office, etc. to speak to each other

examples.x: The office installed an intercom system so employees could communicate with each other easily across different rooms.
I used the intercom system to let the delivery driver know where to leave the package.
He pressed the button on the intercom system to ask if anyone was available for a meeting.
The intercom system in the hospital makes it easy for staff to communicate in different departments.
She was able to speak to her neighbor through the intercom system without leaving her apartment.

sense.definition: an electronic device that detects the presence of carbon monoxide gas and sounds an alarm to alert occupants in case of high levels of the gas, which is poisonous and can be lethal

examples.x: The carbon monoxide detector went off in the middle of the night, alerting us to a potential danger.
It is important to install a carbon monoxide detector near the kitchen and bedrooms to ensure safety.
The carbon monoxide detector is essential in homes with gas appliances to prevent poisoning.
I replaced the battery in my carbon monoxide detector to ensure it would keep working properly.

sense.definition: a device that detects the presence of movement within a specific area and can trigger an alarm or other action as a result

examples.x: The motion detector in the hallway turned on the lights as soon as I walked past.
The security system uses a motion detector to monitor any movement around the house.
The motion detector alerted the homeowners when someone tried to enter their yard at night.
The outdoor lights are connected to a motion detector, so they automatically turn on when someone approaches.
The motion detector inside the store triggered the alarm when it sensed someone entering after hours.

sense.definition: a central device that connects and controls multiple smart home devices and allows them to work together seamlessly
an electronic device with a screen that receives television signals, on which we can watch programs

examples.x: The television in the living room is quite large.
The television was turned off during dinner.
We bought a new television with 4K resolution.
She turned the television on to catch the news.
